creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 244384
Screenshot: the partially fixed web page to the right, HeadingsMap sidebar to its left

In this screenshot: bug 273383 is fixed, however there remain the effects of bug 271477. 

To an ordinary reader of the website (to the right), it appears that 12.4-STABLE, 13.2-STABLE, and 14.0-CURRENT are production quality. 

This is somewhat misleading, in that the word 'production' currently applies solely to -RELEASE versions of the OS (not to -STABLE, and not to -CURRENT). 

----

In the HeadingsMap sidebar, to the left, the intended document structure becomes clear: 

* visible distinction between heading levels. 

<https://addons.mozilla.org/addon/headingsmap/>
<https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/headingsmap/flbjommegcjonpdmenkdiocclhjacmbi>
<https://microsoftedge.microsoft.com/addons/detail/headingsmap/bokekiiaddinealohkmhjcgfanndmcgo>
